---
title: "Frederick James Furnivall"
---

## Frederick James Furnivall

**Dates:** (1825-1910)

### Description

barrister, philologist

### Biography

He was honorary secretary of the Philological Society and the originator of the proposal for a <i>New English Dictionary</i>. He introduced CMY to Macmillan.

### Letters

- Letter from May 22nd 1877 
- Letter from April 23rd 1874 
- Letter from July 12th [1869?]
- Letter from Febry 21st [1869]
- Letter from July 25th [1864]
- Letter from April 28th 1864
- Letter from Oct 7th 1863
- Letter from Aug 11th 1863
- Letter from Decr 10th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
